title: Executive Order
text:
Sir:*
The President directs me to say that the several Departments of the Government will be closed on the 30th instant, in order to enable the employees of the Government to participate, in connection with the Grand Army of the Republic, in the decoration of the graves of the soldiers who fell during the rebellion.
I am, sir, your obedient servant,
HORACE PORTER,
Secretary.
* Addressed to the heads of the Executive Departments, etc.
